title: GuDoQi Tractor Model Kit, 3D Wooden Puzzle, Wood Construction Kit for Teens Adults to Build, Gift Idea for Birthdays Christmas Father's Day
features: 【Good Material】 3D puzzles are made of reliable wood, non-toxic and tasteless, are safe. Using laser cutting technology, precise and clean, no glue is required during the building process. Once finished, it is in a sturdy structure, no collapse.

【Need DIY Assembly】It comes with wooden boards, you need pop each piece out from the board firstly. And Then, the detailed user manual will guide you step by step on how to assemble the unit. Assembly is easy, but you will need some patience and confidence. When finish it, you will get a great sense of achievement!

【Great Deroration】This 3D hand-craft wooden model kit is a wonderful craft, because the building process cultivates patience and attention. Once finished, it is a good decoration for display, with collection value
【Unique Present】Perfect present idea for Christmas, Thanksgiving Day, Valentine's Day, birthday, and some other special days to express love to people.

【Tip】Free spare parts replacement for 90 days after purchase. If you find something missing, or if you have broken some parts during the building process, please be free to send us messages via “contact sellers”. We will try our best to find a solution that is acceptable for you. Besides, This 3D wooden model is advised for adult or teens over 14 to build.
description: Product Description Great for display and collection. Laser Cutting Technology All the wooden pieces are cut by laser, precise and clean. Moreover, the built up model is firm and sturdy, good for long-term display and collection. Extra Wooden Pieces For some small and thin parts, there are some extra pieces for you to replace, in case you have broken them. Easy Understanding Drawings Manual We adopt the manual method with pictures and texts, which is easy for beginners to understand 3D puzzle How to Build a 3D Wooden Model? Pop out pieces with parallel force. First, pop out the needed wooden pieces from the correspond board according to the user manual. Please note that, it is advised to pop with parallel force. Build each part separately. Secondly, assemble each part separately according to the user manual instructions. Model numbers are marked on each wooden board and each wooden piece. You can find them easily. Moreover, there are corresponded number on the user manual, too. So, you will not miss it. Smooth and lubricate each bur and gear part. Thirdly, smooth and lubricate the burs and gears fully. For mechanical models, it is very important to smooth and lubricate each bur and gear part well, so that the gears will run smoothly, and, the steam locomotive will run smoothly and far. Putting each part together, a cool 3D wooden model will come out finally. Finally, put each part together in order according to the user manual, then, a cool 3D wooden model will come out. You can give it away as a gift, or, you can keep it for yourself as decoration or collection.
